final:
module up_down_counter(
    input wire obf_clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire en,
    input wire up_down,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

always @(posedge obf_clk) begin
    if (~rst) begin
        count <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (en) begin
        if (up_down) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end else begin
            count <= count - 1;
        end
    end
end

endmodule
